calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BANK OF THE WEST.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) DAVID LOURENCO, a Sole Proprietor, and individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Dismissal of Defendants Christina M. Clayton and Eric J. Clayton on file.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of James Roach in support of Default Judgment admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $16,669.09
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,120.48
Attorney's Fees: $2,500.00
Costs: $1,186.18
Total Judgment in the amount of $21,475.75
7. Other (specify): Plaintiff will give defendat credit from any recovery from certain John Deere Backhoe, Serial Number T310GX9340443.

Counsel for Plaintiff to submit Proposed Judgment within five days.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
